summary: Project involves uploading a Google site verification HTML file (google0e657d46cb230404.html) to a website, likely to verify ownership in Google Search Console.
architectural_notes: Google site verification file (google0e657d46cb230404.html) must be served at the website root for Google Search Console verification
known_issues: Google OAuth consent screen is in Testing mode, causing 'cannot access the page' errors for non-whitelisted users

existing_features.title: Serve the Google site verification file at the path /google0e657d46cb230404.html. The file must be accessible at the website root and contain exactly the content: 'google-site-verification: google0e657d46cb230404.html' so that Google Search Console can verify site ownership.

new_feature_requests.summary: Upload google0e657d46cb230404.html Google site verification file to the website root
